lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function reliably and have been well-maintained. The exterior is clean with minor surface scratches. The interior is well-kept and shows typical signs of use.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been exceptionally well-cared for. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior is pristine, showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect; the engine runs silently and the transmission shifts seamlessly. It comes with a full service history and has been stored in a climate-controlled garage. A truly exceptional example for a buyer seeking perfection.

Get ready for your next journey with this dependable vehicle! It's in fair condition, showing some expected wear and tear from its years of service, but it remains a solid and functional choice. If you're looking for a reliable ride at a great value, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several visible scratches, minor dings on the passenger side, and some paint fading on the hood. Inside, the cabin is
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is in pristine condition with no mechanical issues and no cosmetic wear on the interior or exterior.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, presented in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing virtually no signs of wear, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class. The exterior finish remains flawless, complemented by a pristine interior that retains its original luster. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising standard of quality, this vehicle stands as a premier acquisition.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for it to find a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, so you won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a concours-level 2003 BMW M3, a definitive example of the E46 chassis. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, the engine utilizes high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen retains its factory-spec Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and Variable M Differential Lock for optimal torque vectoring. Meticulously maintained, the rear subframe has been reinforced, and the rod bearings and VANOS system have been proactively addressed to ensure mechanical longevity. The suspension geometry remains true to OEM specifications, utilizing MacPherson struts and a multi-link rear setup for superlative lateral grip. This is an investment-grade, turn-key driver’s car with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Clean title. No accidents. Original factory paint. Interior like new. Fully inspected.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, preserved by a high-end ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats remain supple and free of any creases or wear, while the original floor mats look untouched and the dashboard is pristine. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a meticulously documented service history and incredibly low mileage that ensures a smooth, powerful ride. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a specimen of unparalleled quality that has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage since day one.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle maintained to

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a pristine exterior finish and a showroom-quality interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand absolute perfection in their automotive pursuits.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a garage and pampered since day one. It looks and drives exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or smudge to be found! I’m really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
Offered is a museum-grade E92 BMW M3, featuring the naturally aspirated 4.0L S65 V8 powerplant with its signature eight
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. Full service history available. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in pristine, showroom-quality condition. Meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and retains its original factory scent, while the high-tech infotainment and climate systems function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history from authorized dealerships ensuring the engine and transmission operate with surgical precision. Every detail, from the untouched alloy wheels to the spotless undercarriage, reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence and meticulous preservation. Every facet of this motorcar has been maintained to an exacting standard, ensuring a driving experience and aesthetic presence indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of peerless quality and uncompromising mechanical integrity.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with flawless paintwork and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of uncompromising mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I am so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem. It is in seriously incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it garaged and spotless, so you won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and runs perfectly. I’m only selling because I need something a bit bigger for the family, but I know you’re going to fall in love with it the second you see it!
Offered is a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history included. No issues.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in pristine, showroom condition. This car has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and shows like it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint retains a brilliant, glass-like luster without a single stone chip or parking lot blemish. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery is taut and unmarked, the carpets are spotless, and all high-tech interfaces operate with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. With a clean title, zero accident history, and low mileage, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. It drives tight, quiet, and powerful, offering a 'like-new' experience for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to offer this exceptional vehicle, presented in peerless, showroom-grade condition. This specimen has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, manifesting in an interior and exterior of uncompromising integrity. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in showroom-quality state, exhibiting impeccable aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that transcends the ordinary, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and followed every single maintenance schedule to a T. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and is ready for its next adventure with you!

Offering an impeccably preserved E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six power plant with a flawlessly maintained double-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies. This chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and retains its structural integrity. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque vectoring. Every bushing, seal, and suspension component is in showroom-grade condition, delivering the precise, linear handling and high-revving performance characteristic of a true collector-grade specimen. This is a concours-level example for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection.
Pristine condition. No cosmetic flaws. All records available. Non-smoker. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, complemented by original wheels that remain free of any curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, smelling fresh and showing no signs of wear on the premium leather seating, bolsters, or interior touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the high-fidelity surround sound, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced ahead of schedule exclusively at authorized dealerships. With remarkably low mileage and a comprehensive, documented maintenance history, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity to own an impeccably preserved example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. Meticulously inspected and prepared for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
